calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-21-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Randall Schmidt for Michael Perrault and Sheri Byrne-Haber (Co-Administrators).

Mr. Schmidt stated that the Heirs finally have a stipulation regarding the tangible personal property, that he has submitted a stipulation via e-file, but it has not been filed yet and provided a proposed order that reflects the stipulation. The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-22-2019 Continued To Sep-23-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-22-2019 Continued To Aug-26-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Randall Schmidt for Co-Administrators.

Mr. Schmidt stated that he needs additional time to clear up/amend this petition, and that there are 100 items of tangible personal property that the parties are working on. The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account, etc. is continued to August 26, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-01-2019 Continued To Jul-22-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-29-2019 Continued To Jul-01-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Randall Schmidt for Co-Administrators.

The Court noted that there is an issue regarding pro rata distribution of the personal property. Ms. Schmidt stated that he filed a waiver and consent by the other Beneficiary (Arlene/decedent's Mother), that Mr. Perrault has signed several declarations stating that he waives pro rata distribution and that there are so many small items. Mr. Schmidt also stated that Arlene is in Illinois, that the items are in Pennsylvania in a storage unit, and that once the parties go through the items, he will file receipts. The Court informed Counsel that the parties need to pick what they are getting, and that he needs to file receipts and then file for final distribution. The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account, etc. is continued to July 1, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-18-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-20-2018 Continued To Jul-18-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Randall Schmidt for Co-Administrators.

Mr. Schmidt stated that the last inventory and appraisal has over eighty items, that they are in the process of doing some horse trading, that one Beneficiary wants the car, that the other wants the computer equipment, and that he will do a petition for approval of report on status of administration. Status on close of estate is continued to July 18, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Schmidt is to file either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration by July 12, 2018.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-14-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-30-2018 Continued To May-14-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randall Schmidt for Michael Perrault and Sheri Byrne-Haber (Co-Administrators) via Court Call

The Court noted that it has received a proposed order, and inquired as to proper proof of service. Mr. Schmidt stated that the estate is now in a position to closed, additional bond, and supplemental inventory have been filed, and Arlene's (beneficiary) waiver of notice as well as waiver of the required language was filed on April 9, 2018. The Amended Petition to Approve Status of Administration is continued to May 14, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for review of the above filings.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Off Calendar Jan-10-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Randall Schmidt for Sherry Byrne-Haber and Michael Perrault (Co-Administrators).

Mr. Schmidt stated that he filed an ex parte petition to increase bond, and a petition for approval of report on status on administration with a hearing date of February 13, 2018. Status on close of estate is off calendar.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-13-2017 Continued To Jan-10-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Randall Schmidt for Co-Administrators.

Mr. Schmidt stated that he filed a declaration advising status, that the final taxes are being filed as he speaks, that there is a storage box that has collectables and that they need to do a supplemental inventory and appraisal. Status on close of estate is continued to January 10, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel is to file an ex parte petition to increase bond, and a petition for approval of report on status of administration.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Off Calendar Nov-08-2017 Continued To Nov-29-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing An Inventory And Appraisal And Bond
Off Calendar Apr-11-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing An Inventory And Appraisal And Bond
Off Calendar Mar-14-2017 Continued To Apr-11-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randall B. Schmidt, counsel for the Administrator, Michael Perrault.

Mr. Schmidt advises the Court of the status of the administration of the estate. He notes that the decedent had a highly encrypted computer which has made it difficult to determine certain financial assets of the estate such as bitcoins ostensibly owned by the decedent. The administrator is working with representatives from Google to attempt to extract data from the device. In summary, he notes that there will most likely be three partial Inventories and Appraisals: 1. for the electronic assets, 2. More commonly held financial assets, and 3. Personal property of the decedent. The Court noted with some concern the want of prosecution of the inventory of the personal property of the decedent for which Mr. Randall acknowledges unwarranted delay.

After further consideration, the Court continues the hearing to April 11, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. and strongly encourages counsel to finalize and file the Inventory by that date.

Judge: Hon. Peter J. Busch; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Jaime; Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing An Inventory And Appraisal And Bond
Off Calendar Feb-14-2017 Continued To Mar-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mr. Schmidt reported that he has now received the required information and that his clients are in the process of preparing the Inventory and Appraisal. He stated that he would need 30-60 days to complete it and get it on file. The matter was continued to March 14, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy A. Jaime. (Not reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing An Inventory And Appraisal And Bond
Off Calendar Jan-17-2017 Continued To Feb-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Randall Schmidt for Petitioners Michael Perrualt and Sheri Byrne-Haber.

Mr. Randall stated that he made the request to Google to access the G-mail e-mail account, that there was a typo in the order and that they are going to get the information. Mr. Randall also stated that Sheri was best friends with the Decedent, that she knows he has assets and that everything is in his Google e-mail. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is continued to February 14, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that the matter can go off calendar because he will have filed it by then.

Judge: Peter J. Busch/John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Duong. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing An Inventory And Appraisal And Bond
Off Calendar Nov-08-2016 Continued To Dec-20-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randall Schmidt for (co-administrators) Michael Perrault & Sheri Byrne-Haber.

The Court stated that we are looking for an inventory & appraisal. Mr. Schmidt reported that he tried to e-file an ex parte application for an order to Google to release information, that it was rejected and he is unable to reach the clerk to clarify why. The Court stated that it does not know what is wrong with the ex parte, that it is not happy with third parties dictating language for orders but that until it is on calendar it does not know what it going on. The status on filing an inventory & appraisal was continued to December 20, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing An Inventory And Appraisal And Bond
Off Calendar Oct-11-2016 Continued To Nov-08-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randall Schmidt for (co-administrators) Michael Perrault & Sheri Byrne-Haber.

The Court stated that it needs an Inventory & Appraisal. Mr. Schmidt reported that the original letters were signed and the tried to e-file them but it was rejected, that they then got lost in the mail, that there has been a delay in getting the new letters signed and filed and that the Inventory & Appraisal will be filed soon after that. The status on filing an inventory & appraisal was continued to November 8, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that everything will be filed one week prior to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)
